use_cases: Display available appointment or meeting slots in a responsive grid layout with staggered entrance animations
Allow users to select time slots for booking appointments in healthcare or service scheduling contexts
Present time-based availability for scheduling demos, consultations, or property viewings
Provide a selectable slot interface for class registration or event booking systems
Enable users to browse and pick from available time windows with visual feedback on selection
ai_summary: A scheduling card component that displays available time slots in a responsive grid with staggered Framer Motion animations. Built with Tailwind and shadcn/ui patterns, it supports themed styling and manages selection state with click interactions. Ideal for appointment booking, demo scheduling, and availability selection across healthcare, education, and service-based applications.
